emails.subject: A resume
emails.body: A resume John, I am not sure if I have already sent you this resume. Please, take a look at it. I met Claude a few years ago and was greatly impressed by him. He may be a good candidate to work with Andy Zipper. Vince

emails.subject: RE: A resume
emails.body: RE: A resume I would love to talk to him. Does he live in France. Is it easier for him to work in London. If not I would be happy to do a phone interview. Please advise

emails.subject: RE: A resume
emails.body: John, He travels periodically to Houston. I may inquire about his next trip. If you want to speak to him urgently, I can arrange a phone interview or invite him to Houston. Vince

emails.subject: RE: A resume
emails.body: John, Additional info. He prefers Houston. Vince
